word: G729 - ἄῤῥαφος - árrhaphos - ar'-hhraf-os - Without seam

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (ஆண்பால்)
not sewed together, without a seam
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of the same as G4476; unsewed, that is, of a single piece: - without seam.
